results.rendered_html: the berry of Abrus precatorius (averaging about 1 5/16 grains troy) or the artificial weight called after it (weighing about 2 3/16 grains, = 1/5 Ādya-māṣaka or Māṣaka, = 3 or 2 barley-corns, = 4 grains of rice, = 2 grains of wheat,  L. ; with physicians 7 Guñjās = 1 Mātha, with lawyers 7 1/2 Guñjās),  Yājñ. iii, 273 ;  Cāṇ. ;  VarBṛS.
